emails.subject: Re: 505750
emails.body: Re: 505750 A Real Time guy mistakenly sold to Coral instead of using their established PGE transmission deal. 505750 has been killed and the transmission has been re-scheduled under deal #146517. Kate Rhonda L Denton 01/26/2001 09:50 AM
505750 Please check this deal. It is booked under Coral for transmission. We don't have a transmission contract with Coral and we don't usually sell transmission. Let me know.
